2606.12203.title: Adaptive Multi-Resolution Procedural Knowledge Compression for Large Language Models
2606.12203.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) are widely used to tackle complex tasks with autonomous workflows. Recently, reusable natural language skills have emerged as a popular paradigm to inject procedural knowledge into LLM applications. Since popular skills are often invoked repeatedly, placing their full text in every context significantly increases prefill cost and latency. While text compression techniques have the potential to solve this problem, most existing methods are designed to compress factual knowledge in documents instead of procedural knowledge, making them insufficient for skill compression. In this paper, we argue that an effective skill compression method should: 1) preserve logical dependencies among workflows and tool protocols, 2) enable lightweight, offline compression for frequently updated community skills, and 3) be adaptable to varying complexities across skills. To address this, we present SKIM (SKIll coMpression), an adaptive multi-resolution soft token compression framework for procedural skills. Depending on the complexity of each skill, SKIM creates different numbers of soft tokens that not only improve the efficiency of LLM inference, but also preserve the effectiveness of skill usage. Experiments indicate that SKIM compresses skills to 30 to 60 percent of their original token length while preserving task performance better than existing compression methods.We have released our code at https://github.com/bebr2/SKIM .
2606.12203.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）被廣泛用於處理具有自主工作流程的複雜任務。<lb/>最近，可重用的自然語言技能作為一種流行的範式出現，用以將程序知識注入LLM應用中。<lb/>由於流行的技能經常被重複調用，將其完整文本放入每個上下文中會顯著增加預填成本和延遲。<lb/>雖然文本壓縮技術有潛力解決這個問題，但大多數現有方法是設計用來壓縮文檔中的事實知識，而不是程序知識，這使得它們對技能壓縮來說不夠充分。<lb/>在本文中，我們主張一種有效的技能壓縮方法應該：1）保留工作流程和工具協議之間的邏輯依賴，2）能夠為經常更新的社區技能實現輕量級的離線壓縮，並且3）能夠適應不同技能之間的複雜性變化。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了SKIM（SKIll coMpression），一種適應性的多解析度軟令牌壓縮框架，用於程序技能。<lb/>根據每個技能的複雜性，SKIM創建不同數量的軟令牌，不僅提高了LLM推理的效率，還保留了技能使用的有效性。<lb/>實驗表明，SKIM將技能壓縮到其原始令牌長度的30%到60%，同時在保持任務性能方面優於現有的壓縮方法。我們已在https://github.com/bebr2/SKIM上發布了我們的代碼。
2606.12203.author: Changyue Wang et.al.
2606.12203.authors: Changyue Wang, Weihang Su, Qingyao Ai, Yichen Tang, Runzhong Qiao, Xuancheng Li, Min Zhang, Yiqun Liu
